subcodes.title: Words to Myron Phelps and Madame Canavarro in Dec. 1902
subcodes.first_line: Happiness is of two kinds: physical, possessed by animals and men, and spiritual, which is known only by those men who have attained to holiness.
subcodes.subjects: @material and spiritual existence; two books, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
